---
title: Detecting and quantifying aircraft and other on-airport contributions to ambient nitrogen oxides in the vicinity of
  a large international airport
date: '2006-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- S.D. Beevers
- K. Ropkins
- M.C. Bell
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Detecting and quantifying aircraft and other on-airport contributions to ambient nitrogen oxides in the vicinity of a large international airport

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, S.D. Beevers, K. Ropkins, M.C. Bell</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2006


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2006-a.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
